title: "A Home Where The Lord Is Honored" Colossians 3:18-21

notes.introduction: An exposition of Colossians 3:18-21 on God's design for the home, addressing the distinct responsibilities of wives, husbands, children, and fathers within a biblically ordered household. Cross-referenced throughout with Ephesians 5:18-6:3 and grounded in the preceding Colossians 3 passage on putting off the old man and walking in the Spirit.

sections.heading: God as Designer of the Home
Roles Addressed: Wives, Husbands, Children, Fathers
Instruction Understood but Not Yet Applied
Being Filled with the Spirit as the Enabling Foundation
